mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_cart (user_id, book_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_id, c.book_id, e.book_title, e.author, e.cover_img, e.price, e.category_id, cat.category_name, e.language, e.status, c.create_time FROM tb_cart c INNER JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.book_id = e.book_id LEFT JOIN tb_category cat ON e.category_id = cat.category_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND e.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_cart SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_cart c INNER JOIN tb_ebook e ON c.book_id = e.book_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND e.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_cart SET is_deleted = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = 1
